query:
SELECT bsup.*, fr.name as responsible_name
FROM billing_system_unit_prices bsup
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = bsup.financial_responsible_id
WHERE bsup.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY bsup.starts_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
